message:
franken_numpy-conf: add conformance tests for new polynomial functions

Adds differential test cases and harness support for:
- polymulx: multiply polynomial by x
- polypow: raise polynomial to integer power
- polytrim: remove small trailing coefficients
- polyvander: Vandermonde matrix construction
- polyvalfromroots: evaluate polynomial from roots

8 new test cases with NumPy oracle values verified against
numpy.polynomial.polynomial module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
